name: 小古文里的‘之乎者也’
name_en: Classical Chinese Starter: Zhi Hu Ye
subject: chinese
author: weponusa
description: Interactive Grade 5 Chinese courseware on introductory Classical Chinese, using the clue words zhi, hu, and ye to build a first reading strategy through Yang Shi Zhi Zi, Self-Contradictory Spears and Shields, and sayings on reading.
description_zh: 小学五年级小古文入门互动课件，围绕“之、乎、也”三个高频线索词，结合《杨氏之子》《自相矛盾》《古人谈读书》建立文言阅读第一套方法。
